message:
test(messaging): comprehensive service contract unit tests — 33 new tests

Bead 8w83i.10.2: Unit tests for service contracts.

- PayloadShape validation (empty named schema, all variants)
- ReplyShape validation (None, Unary, Stream inner shape)
- BudgetSemantics (zero timeout rejection, None timeout)
- MobilityConstraint::satisfies() (7 tests: pinned/bounded/unrestricted
  combinations, region matching, boundary validation)
- OverloadPolicy (zero queue capacity, all variants validate)
- ServiceContractSchema validation (default, invalid overload)
- ProviderTerms vs contract (compensation, evidence, mobility
  incompatibility)
- ServiceFailure abort_reason mapping (all 6 variants)
- Display impls (CleanupUrgency, CancellationObligations, ServiceFailure)
- Serialization round-trips (schema, PayloadShape, MobilityConstraint,
  OverloadPolicy — all variants)
- Default enum values (8 types verified)

44 total tests (11 existing + 33 new), 0 new clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
